description: Add red cells into the missing concave area beside the blue object. Existing blue cells remain unchanged. Confidence is medium because the boundary rule may vary with the object's shape.
arcDslCode:
from dsl import *
from constants import *


def solve_1b60fb0c(I):
    x1 = rot90(I)
    x2 = ofcolor(I, ONE)
    x3 = ofcolor(x1, ONE)
    x4 = neighbors(ORIGIN)
    x5 = mapply(neighbors, x4)
    x6 = lbind(shift, x3)
    x7 = apply(x6, x5)
    x8 = lbind(intersection, x2)
    x9 = compose(size, x8)
    x10 = argmax(x7, x9)
    O = underfill(I, TWO, x10)
    return O
